atmosphere_layers.description: Dense fog (짙은 안개) shrouding the Magic Immortal Tower (魔仙樓), so thick that no one outside can see people within. A sense of hidden power and seclusion.

Dark humor between masters and disciple. The Poison Demon drinks mysterious black tea, speaks gruffly. Playful verbal sparring masks genuine affection. Jin Sohan performs 'Heoun Singong' (허언신공 - Art of Eloquent Lies) with theatrical sincerity.
Jin Sohan returns after 12 years to find his Sword Dance Troupe vanished. Empty streets, changed buildings, no familiar faces. The ache of an orphan losing his second family.
atmosphere_layers.visual_weight: lonely figure against sprawling dark cityscape

atmosphere_layers.description: Hostile gazes in the inn, tension over black clothing taboo, building dread. Casual violence erupts — chopsticks pierce foreheads with terrifying precision. Cold, controlled rage.
atmosphere_layers.visual_weight: claustrophobic interior, sharp contrast between calm demeanor and lethal action

mood_analysis.emotional_arc: isolation → dark humor → melancholy → cold fury → restrained grief

jin_sohan.face: 하얀 피부에 시원하게 생긴 미남 — pale white skin, refreshingly handsome features, strikingly good-looking
jin_sohan.eyes: 옅은 잿빛 — pale ash-grey eyes, described as 'strange' and unsettling to others, turbid (탁한) quality
jin_sohan.build: implied lean and trained, performer's body from sword dance troupe background

clothing.primary: 백의무복 위에 흑색 장삼 — white martial arts inner robe layered under a black ceremonial overcoat (장삼)
clothing.headwear: 방갓 — traditional wide-brimmed hat worn deep/low to shadow the face
clothing.weapon: 칼 at the waist, emitting a chilling aura (서늘한 분위기)
clothing.visual_contrast: black over white layering — duality of his two masters' influence

jin_sohan.demeanor: 침착 (composed), 진중 (grave/earnest), theatrical precision from performer training. Switches between casual speech and formal politeness as social weapon. Kills without changing expression.
jin_sohan.special_trait: extraordinary regeneration ability (특이한 신체 재생력), immune to most poisons
jin_sohan.flux_kontext_prompt_keywords: young Korean man, 26 years old, pale skin, ash-grey eyes, handsome sharp features, white martial arts robe under black long overcoat, traditional Korean hat, calm piercing gaze, wuxia style

dokma.relation: twin brother (of Uiseon), Jin Sohan's primary master
dokma.face: identical twin face but with dark/gloomy complexion (낯빛이 어두웠고), shaped by decades of poison work
dokma.demeanor: gruff (퉁명스럽게), sardonic smirks (씨익 웃었다), snorts of derision (코웃음), boisterous laughter (너털웃음). Drinks mysterious pitch-black tea (시커먼 찻물).
dokma.personality_visual_cue: NOT a normal person — casually poisons his own disciple to test toxins, chaotic energy masked by hermit lifestyle
dokma.flux_kontext_prompt_keywords: middle-aged Korean man, twin, dark complexion, black traditional robes, sinister smirk, wuxia poison master, gloomy aura, sharp eyes

uiseon.relation: twin brother (of Dokma), Jin Sohan's secondary master
uiseon.face: identical twin face but with scholarly atmosphere (학사 같은 분위기)
uiseon.demeanor: gentle-spoken (얌전하게), measured, nurturing. The healer counterpart.
uiseon.flux_kontext_prompt_keywords: middle-aged Korean man, twin, scholarly gentle expression, white traditional robes, serene healer, wuxia physician, warm wise gaze

oh_jecheol.role: middle-aged mercenary/sellsword leader in the inn
oh_jecheol.weapon: 대도 (大刀) — large saber/broadsword, handle wrapped in grimy cloth soaked with dried blood (핏자국이 덕지덕지)
oh_jecheol.demeanor: initially blustering but progressively intimidated by Jin Sohan, shifts from casual speech to honorifics
oh_jecheol.flux_kontext_prompt_keywords: middle-aged rugged Korean man, large build, worn leather armor, large heavy saber with bloodstained handle, mercenary, wuxia bandit

dogon.role: inn server (점소이), former acquaintance of Jin Sohan from childhood, age 28
dogon.notable: carries a sword despite being a server — speaks to the danger of the area
dogon.flux_kontext_prompt_keywords: young Korean man, late twenties, inn servant clothing, sword at waist, nervous expression

chumyeongwi.role: mentioned ally who tried to save the Sword Dance Troupe women, currently fugitive
chumyeongwi.significance: unseen character but important — represents unlikely heroism
chumyeongwi.flux_kontext_prompt_keywords: Korean man, heavily scarred ugly face, fierce warrior, wuxia fugitive, determined eyes

duhyang.role: remembered beautiful elder-sister figure (누님) from the Sword Dance Troupe
duhyang.description: 아름다운 누님 — beautiful older woman, sword dancer, fate unknown/tragic (implied sexual violence by 회혈문)
duhyang.flux_kontext_prompt_keywords: beautiful young Korean woman, elegant, traditional dancer clothing, graceful, melancholic, wuxia sword dancer

maseollu.name: 魔仙樓 / Magic Immortal Tower
maseollu.atmosphere: perpetually shrouded in thick fog (자욱한 안개), invisible from outside
maseollu.interior_implied: tea-drinking setting, intimate space for three people, likely traditional wooden pavilion
maseollu.flux_kontext_prompt: traditional Korean mountain pavilion shrouded in dense fog, mysterious atmosphere, dark wood architecture, misty peaks, wuxia hermit dwelling, moody lighting

seoheullo.name: 西黑路 / Western Black Road
seoheullo.type: black market district, underworld territory (흑도 영역)
seoheullo.atmosphere: buildings packed more densely than before (빽빽), streets once crowded now unusually quiet tonight (한산), every alley building oozes sinister energy (음험한 기운)
seoheullo.cultural_detail: black clothing is taboo here — wearing black invites violence. Only the powerful dare wear it.
seoheullo.commerce: enormous wealth traded nightly, even orthodox sect members sneak in disguised to buy from black markets (흑점)
seoheullo.flux_kontext_prompt: dark narrow Korean traditional street at night, dense buildings, lantern-lit alleyways, black market district, wuxia underworld, ominous atmosphere, few shadowy figures, fog wisps

wollyaru.name: 月夜樓 / Moonlit Night Tower
wollyaru.type: building where the Sword Dance Troupe (검무단) once was — now something else entirely
wollyaru.mood: absence and loss — the sign remains but the people are gone
wollyaru.flux_kontext_prompt: abandoned traditional Korean performance hall at night, faded signboard, empty courtyard, moonlight, desolate atmosphere

gyedu_gaekjan.name: 계두객잔 / Rooster Head Inn
gyedu_gaekjan.type: sellsword gathering place (매검하는 자들이 자주 모이는 곳)
gyedu_gaekjan.atmosphere: hostile gazes, armed patrons sheltering from the cold, tense standoff energy, blood on the floor after violence
gyedu_gaekjan.details: old establishment that survived 12 years of change, serves 노주 (aged rice wine) and 계두국수 (rooster head noodles) and 만두 (dumplings)
gyedu_gaekjan.flux_kontext_prompt: dimly lit traditional Korean inn interior, armed mercenaries at wooden tables, oil lamps, weapons leaning against walls, tense atmosphere, wuxia tavern, warm amber lighting against dark shadows

action_style.combat_philosophy: 극도의 절제 속 순간적 치명타 — extreme restraint punctuated by instant lethality

signature_technique.effect: pierces foreheads (이마에 젓가락이 박혀), instant death
signature_technique.sound_design: 푹/푸욱 — soft, muffled puncture sounds, not dramatic slashing
signature_technique.speed: so fast others only see something flash past their eyes (눈앞을 스치고 지나갔다)

visual_pacing: Long dialogue buildup with mounting tension
Psychological dominance through stillness after violence

panel_recommendations.buildup: Slow pacing, close-ups of eyes and hands, speech bubbles dominating panels
panel_recommendations.kill_moment: Speed lines, motion blur on the chopstick trajectory, freeze-frame on impact — wide panel or full-width bleed
panel_recommendations.aftermath: Dead silence panel, no sfx, just Jin Sohan calmly pouring wine while bodies are visible in periphery
panel_recommendations.contrast_technique: Juxtapose the softness of his voice ('앉아' — 'Sit down') with the horror of two fresh corpses

action_style.flux_kontext_action_keywords: subtle lethal motion, chopstick projectile, instant kill, calm after violence, wuxia precision strike, minimal movement maximum impact

black.significance: 흑의 (black robes) = power, taboo, danger, Poison Demon's identity, the underworld itself
black.usage: Jin Sohan's outer robe, Dokma's robes, night streets, ink-like tea, dried blood on weapons

white.significance: 백의 (white robes) = healing, scholarly virtue, Medicine Immortal's identity, Jin Sohan's inner robe, his pale skin
white.usage: Inner garments, Uiseon's robes, skin tones, fog

ash_grey.significance: Jin Sohan's unique eye color (옅은 잿빛), liminal identity between black and white, between poison and medicine
ash_grey.usage: Eyes, fog effects, moral ambiguity visualization

deep_amber.source: 노주 (aged rice wine), oil lamp light in the inn, warm candlelight
deep_amber.usage: Interior lighting, liquid in cups, warm spots in otherwise dark scenes

dark_crimson.source: dried blood on saber handle (핏자국이 덕지덕지), implied violence throughout
dark_crimson.usage: Weapon details, blood splatter, emotional rage moments

mist_blue.source: moonlit fog, night atmosphere, wind (세차게 불어오는 바람)
mist_blue.usage: Exterior night scenes, fog effects, melancholic flashback tinting

pitch_black_liquid.source: Dokma's mysterious black tea (시커먼 찻물), poison imagery

color_implications.color_narrative: The entire novel operates on a BLACK vs WHITE duality embodied by the twin masters, with Jin Sohan literally wearing both (white inner, black outer). His ash-grey eyes mark him as the synthesis of both worlds. The amber warmth of inn scenes creates isolated pockets of human connection in an otherwise cold, dark world.

recommended_style.overall_direction: Dark Korean Wuxia Noir — NOT the bright, clean manhwa style typical of modern Korean webtoons. This demands a moodier, more cinematic approach closer to historical jidaigeki or film noir aesthetics.

art_style_reference.primary: Vagabond (바가본드) by Inoue Takehiko — for its ink-wash atmosphere and emotional face work
art_style_reference.secondary: Blade of the Immortal — for its gritty, violent-yet-beautiful aesthetic
art_style_reference.tertiary: The Breaker (브레이커) — for Korean martial arts manhwa panel dynamics
art_style_reference.color_ref: Vinland Saga colored edition — muted historical palette with dramatic lighting

model_selection.character_portraits: fal-ai/flux-pro/kontext — highest quality for establishing character reference sheets
model_selection.scene_backgrounds: fal-ai/flux-pro/kontext — detailed environments with atmospheric fog/lighting
model_selection.action_panels: fal-ai/flux-pro/kontext/max — for complex multi-element compositions with speed/motion
model_selection.editing_passes: fal-ai/flux-pro/kontext — reference-based editing for consistency across panels

reference_image_workflow.step_1: Generate twin masters first (Dokma in black, Uiseon in white) — use same base face with Kontext editing to differentiate aura/complexion
reference_image_workflow.step_2: Generate Jin Sohan with ash-grey eyes, layered black-over-white robes, traditional hat
reference_image_workflow.step_3: Use character references in all subsequent scene generations for consistency
reference_image_workflow.step_4: Generate key environments (魔仙樓 in fog, 西黑路 at night, 계두객잔 interior) as reusable backgrounds

prompt_style_guidelines.always_include: Korean wuxia, traditional Korean clothing (hanbok-influenced martial arts robes), East Asian architecture
prompt_style_guidelines.atmosphere_tags: moody, atmospheric, cinematic lighting, fog, dark palette, ink-wash influence
prompt_style_guidelines.avoid: anime style, bright saturated colors, modern clothing, Japanese/Chinese architecture confusion, cute/chibi aesthetics
prompt_style_guidelines.quality_tags: detailed fabric texture, realistic skin, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting

dialogue_heavy_scenes.layout: Vertical scroll format (webtoon native), 2-3 panels per viewport, generous negative space
dialogue_heavy_scenes.emphasis: Close-up face shots alternating with medium shots, subtle expression changes carry the drama
dialogue_heavy_scenes.example_scene: Jin Sohan's 'Heoun Singong' scene — theatrical hand gestures, shifting vocal tones visualized through panel border style changes

action_scenes.layout: Full-width bleed panels for kill moments, thin horizontal slices for speed, large gutters for breathing room after violence
action_scenes.emphasis: Minimal motion lines — the horror comes from the RESULT not the motion. Show the chopstick already embedded, not in flight.
action_scenes.example_scene: Inn killing — one panel shows Jin Sohan's hand near chopstick holder, next panel shows victim with chopstick in forehead, third panel shows Jin Sohan calmly pouring wine

atmospheric_scenes.layout: Tall vertical panels for the fog-shrouded tower, wide panoramic panels for 西黑路 night streets
atmospheric_scenes.emphasis: Environmental storytelling — the changed cityscape reflecting 12 years of loss
atmospheric_scenes.example_scene: Jin Sohan standing before the 月夜樓 sign, alone in the changed street — single tall panel with heavy negative space above

typography_and_sfx.dialogue_style: Clean Korean text, vary weight for speech patterns — Dokma gets rougher/bolder text, Uiseon gets thinner/elegant text, Jin Sohan shifts between both
typography_and_sfx.sfx_approach: Minimal. '푹' and '푸욱' should be small, almost whispered sound effects — NOT the large explosive SFX typical of action manhwa. The quiet of the kill IS the horror.
typography_and_sfx.narration_boxes: Thin-bordered, semi-transparent dark boxes for Jin Sohan's internal monologue
